assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Start a Splunk Cloud trial, upload the tutorial dataset, and run a search that returns indexed events.

first_success.outcome: Splunk Cloud indexes the tutorial file and a Search query returns its events.
first_success.observable_signal: The Search and Reporting app displays events from the tutorial dataset.

route_selection.surface: Splunk Cloud Search Tutorial with uploaded tutorial data
route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.
route_selection.selected: Splunk Cloud Search Tutorial with uploaded tutorial data

candidates.name: Splunk Cloud Search Tutorial with uploaded tutorial data
candidates.reason: The hosted Splunk Cloud tutorial reaches indexed and searchable data without installing a local Splunk Enterprise server.

candidates.name: Local Splunk Enterprise Search Tutorial
candidates.reason: It requires a local server installation; the selected route uses the hosted Cloud trial.

required_path.action: Create or activate a Splunk Cloud trial and open the stack.
required_path.observable_result: The Splunk Cloud home page is available.

required_path.action: Download the tutorial data file from the Search Tutorial.
required_path.observable_result: The tutorial archive is available locally.

required_path.action: Use Add Data to upload the tutorial file and complete the documented source and index settings.
required_path.observable_result: Splunk accepts and indexes the upload.

required_path.action: Open Search and Reporting and run the tutorial search.
Confirm that events from the tutorial data appear in results.

prerequisites.description: A Splunk Cloud trial or account with an available stack.
Permission to add data and use Search and Reporting.
The tutorial data file downloaded as directed by the tutorial.

external_gates.description: A Splunk Cloud stack must finish provisioning before login and indexing.
The user needs data-input and search permissions.

platform_outcomes.description: Splunk Cloud indexes the tutorial file and a Search query returns its events.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

uncertainties.question: Cloud trial availability, provisioning time, and current signup requirements can vary.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
